title: The Killing of Zayd b. 'Ali
description: According to Hishim ' (b. Mukiammad al-Kalbi)-Abu Mikhnaf: When Zayd b. 'Ali commanded his followers to get ready to rebel and to make preparations, those who wanted to adhere to their pledge of allegiance to him began what he had ordered them to do in that eventuality. Sulaymin b. Suragah al-Barigi185 went to Yusuf b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 26
